title: Okay, this unleashed my agent
summary: A video showcasing agent frameworks and techniques including autoresearch, multi-layer memory systems, and self-evolving skill mechanisms. The creator demonstrates practical implementations with Claude and compares self-evolution approaches across platforms like Hermes and Openclaw.
